chemicalDescription: Clematis Terniflora Flower Extract is the extract of the flowers of  Clematis terniflora, Ranunculaceae.
Sulculus Diversicolor Extract is the extract of the abalone,  Sulculus diversicolor
Hexylene Glycol Dimethacrylate/Glycol Dimethacrylate Crosspolymer is a crosslinked copolymer of hexylene glycol dimethacrylate and Glycol Dimethacrylate.
Polybutylene Succinate is the product of the polymerization of Succinic Acid and 1,4-Butanediol
Argemone Mexicana Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of  Argemone mexicana  grown in culture, Papaveraceae.
Acanthopanax Sessiliflorus Bark Extract is the extract of the bark of Acanthopanax sessiliflorus, Araliaceae.
Methyl Ionones is a mixture of isomers consisting of Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, beta-isomethylionone, alpha-methylionone, and beta-methylionone
Isotridecyl Phosphate is the complex mixture of esters of phosphoric acid with Isotridecyl Alcohol.
Polyglyceryl-3 Olivate Phosphate is a complex mixture of esters of phosphoric acid with the ester formed by the reaction of Polyglycerin-3 and Olive Acid

sh-Polypeptide-7 sh-Polypeptide-94 sh-Polypeptide-95 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in Chinese hamster ovary cells (CHO). The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Polypeptide-7, sh-Polypeptide-94, and sh-Polypeptide-95. The fusion peptide contains 436 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids
Chlorella Sorokiniana Extract is the extract of the alga, Chlorella sorokiniana, Chlorellaceae.
Hydrolyzed Vaccinium Vitis-Idaea Fruit is the hydrolysate of the fruit of  Vaccinium vitis-idaea  derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis, Ericaceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: TRIPEPTIDE-46 HEXAPEPTIDE-40 DECAPEPTIDE-27 ISOLEUCYL OLIGOPEPTIDE-91 TETRAPEPTIDE-38 SH- POLYPEPTIDE-9
chemicalDescription: Tripeptide-46 Hexapeptide-40 Decapeptide-27 Isoleucyl Oligopeptide-91 Tetrapeptide-38 sh- Polypeptide-9 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in  E. coli.  The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from Tripeptide-46, Hexapeptide-40, Decapeptide-27, Isoleucine, Oligopeptide-91, Tetrapeptide-38 , and sh-Polypeptide-9. The fusion peptide contains a maximum of 212 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
inciName: TRIPEPTIDE-46 HEXAPEPTIDE-40 DECAPEPTIDE-27 ISOLEUCYL OLIGOPEPTIDE-91 TETRAPEPTIDE-38 SH- POLYPEPTIDE-9

chemicalDescription: Triethylammonium DMPA/IPDI Copolymer is a copolymer of dimethylolpropionic acid (DMPA) and Isophorone Diisocyanate (IPDI) that is neutralized with trimethylamine after the polymerization reaction is completed.
Lactobacillus/Corn/Sea Cucumber Ferment Extract is the extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of  Zea mays  and  Apostichopus japonicus  by the microorganism,  Lactobacillus.

Schizothrix Calcicola Extract is the extract of the alga,  Schizothrix calcicola, Schizotrichaceae.
Polyglyceryl-35 Lauryl Ether is the ether of Lauryl Alcohol and a glycerin polymer containing an average of 35 glycerin units.
Dendrobium Loddigesii Leaf/Stem Extract is the extract of the leaves and stems of  Dendrobium loddigesii, Orchidaceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: LACTOBACILLUS/RHODOPSEUDOMONAS/SACCHAROMYCES/MOLASSES/LAVENDER/THYMUS SERPYLLUM/CYMBOPOGON CITRATUS/PEPPERMINT/MELISSA OFFICINALIS/CHAMOMILLA RECUTITA FLOWER/BERGAMOT LEAF/SPEARMINT/ROSEMARY FERMENT FILTRATE

chemicalDescription: Schinus Terebinthifolia Seed Oil is the oil expressed from the seeds of  Schinus terebinthifolia,  Anacardiaceae.
Scenedesmus Rubescens Extract is the extract of the alga,  Scenedesmus rubescens, Scenedesmaceae.
Bambusa Vulgaris Flower Extract is the extract of the flowers of  Bambusa vulgaris, Poaceae.
3-Hydroxybutyrate/4-Hydroxybutyrate Copolymer is a polymer of 3-hydroxybutyrate and 4-hydroxybutyrate produced through the fermentation of Glucose and 1,4-Butanediol by the microorganism,  E. coli.

Phenylaminopropyl Polysesquioxane is a resinous material composed of a mixture of three-dimensional siloxane polymers and oligomers with cage structures. For the oligomers, each silicon atom in the polysilsesquioxane is connected via oxygen atoms to three other silicon atoms and can be represented by the empirical formulation RSiO3/2 where R represents the phenylaminopropyl group. For the larger polymeric polysilsesquioxanes, some of the silicon atoms are not connected to other silicon atoms and instead have a silanol (SiOH) group. Phenylaminopropyl Polysesquioxane is prepared by the hydrolysis and condensation of N-phenylaminopropyl trimethoxysilane.
Oxidized Ethylene/Propylene Copolymer is the product obtained by the oxidation of Ethylene/Propylene Copolymer
Colloidal Diamond is the product obtained by the suspension of finely divided diamond particles in water.
Cocoyl Methyl Glucamide is the product obtained by the reaction of Methylglucamine with cocoyl chloride.
Aspergillus/Snail Secretion Filtrate Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of Snail Secretion Filtrate by the microorganism,  Aspergillus.
Ligustrum Japonicum Wood Extract is the extract of the wood of  Ligustrum japonicum, Oleaceae.

Leontopodium Alpinum Flower/Leaf Water is the aqueous solution of the steam distillates derived from the flowers and leaves of  Leontopodium alpinum.  The accepted scientific name for  Leontopodium alpinum  is  Leontopodium nivale.
Lilium Brownii Bulb Extract is the extract of the bulbs of  Lilium brownie, Liliaceae.

PEG/PPG-450/50 Trimethylolpropane Lauryl Ether is the alkoxylated derivative of the ether formed by the reaction of Lauryl Alcohol and Trimethylolpropane containing an average of 450 moles of ethylene oxide and 50 moles of propylene oxide.

Polyurethane-65 is a complex urethane copolymer made by reacting Isophorone Diisocyanate (IPDI) with a combination of dimethylolpropionic acid (DMPA) and a copolymer composed of Neopentyl Glycol and Adipic Acid. The resulting polymer is chain extended with ethylene diamine and neutralized with trimethylamine

Bis-HEMA Poly(Caprolactone Neopentyl Glycol)/IPDI Copolymer is formed by reacting a pre-polymer of caprolactone and Neopentyl Glycol with Isophorone Diisocyanate (IPDI). The polymer is end-blocked with HEMA
Lavandula Angustifolia Phytoplacenta Extract is the extract of the phytoplacenta cells directly isolated from the plant  Lavandula angustifolia  or grown in culture
3-Lauryl/Tridecylglyceryl Ascorbate is the product obtained by the reaction of Ascorbic Acid with a mixture of the ethers formed between lauryl alcohol and glycerin and tridecyl alcohol and glycerin.
Dactylorhiza Fuchsii Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Dactylorhiza Fuchsii, Orchidaceae.
Methoxychalcone is the organic compound
Narcissus Pseudonarcissus (Daffodil) Flower Water is the aqueous solution of the steam distillates obtained from the flowers of  Narcissus pseudonarcissus, Amaryllidaceae.

r-Clostridium Histolyticum Collagenase G Hexapeptide-40 is a single chain recombinant fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in  E. coli.  The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from r-Clostridium Histolyticum Collagenase G and Hexapeptide-40. The fusion peptide contains 1124 amino acids, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Palmitoyl Tripeptide-54 Amide is the product obtained by the reaction of palmitoyl chloride and Tripeptide-54
Polyacrylate-40 is a copolymer of 2-ethylhexyl acrylate, isobutylmethacrylate, 4-methyl styrene and 2-tert-butyl styrene monomers.

Trimethylpentyl Polysilsesquioxane is a resinous material composed of a mixture of three-dimensional siloxane polymers and oligomers with cage structures. For the oligomers, each silicon atom in the polysilsesquioxane is connected via oxygen atoms to three other silicon atoms and can be represented by the empirical formulation RSiO3/2 where R represents the trimethylpentyl group. For the larger polymeric polysilsesquioxanes, some of the silicon atoms are not connected to other silicon atoms and instead have a silanol (SiOH) group. Trimethylpentyl Polysilsesquioxane is prepared by the hydrolysis and condensation of 2,4,4-trimethylpentyl trimethoxysilane

Damnacanthus Major Adventitious Root Extract is the extract of the adventitious roots of Damnacanthus major grown in culture,
Olive Oil Polyglyceryl-3 Esters is the product obtained by the transesterification of Polyglycerin-3 and Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil.
Rosa Ambassador/Rosa Peace Phytoplacenta Extract is the extract of the phytoplacenta cells directly isolated from hybrid formed between Rosa ambassador and Rosa peace , or grown in culture.
Pandanus Odoratissimus Seed Extract is the extract of the seeds of Pandanus odoratissimus, Pandanaceae.
Bacillus/Royal Jelly/Soybean Ferment Filtrate Extract is the extract of a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of Royal Jelly and soybean by the microorgansim, Bacillus.
Dalbergia Odorifera Root Extract is the extract of the roots of Dalbergia odorifera, Fabaceae.
Hydrolyzed Citrus Sphaerocarpa Peel Extract is the hydrolysate of an extract of the peel of Citrus sphaerocarpa derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis.

Pelargonium Sidoides Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of Pelargonium Sidoides grown in culture, Geraniaceae.
Bis-sh-Decapeptide-9 Porphyra 334 is the synthetic peptide produced by the reaction of sh-Decapeptide-9 and Porphyra 334.
Myrothamnus Flabellifolia Leaf/Stem Extract is the extract of the leaves and stems of  Myrothamnus flabellifolia, Myrothamnaceae.
Lactobacillus/Ilex Paraguariensis Leaf Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the leaves of  Ilex paraguariensis  by the microorganism,  Lactobacillus.

Isobutyl Polysilsesquioxane is a resinous material composed of a mixture of three-dimensional siloxane polymers and oligomers with cage structures. For the oligomers, each silicon atom in the polysilsesquioxane is connected via oxygen atoms to three other silicon atoms and can be represented by the empirical formulation RSiO3/2 where R represents the isobutyl group. For the larger polymeric polysilsesquioxanes, some of the silicon atoms are not connected to other silicon atoms and instead have a silanol (SiOH) group. Isobutyl Polysilsesquioxane is prepared by the hydrolysis and condensation of 2-methylpropyl trimethoxysilane.
Curcuma Wenyujin/Curcuma Kwangsiensis Rhizome Extract is the extract of the rhizomes of  Curcuma wenyujin  and  Curcuma kwangsiensis.

Bacillus/Tagetes Patula Flower/Soybean Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of Glycine max (soybean) and the flowers of Tagetes patula by the microorganism, Bacillus.

r-Salmon Oligopeptide-1 sh-Oligopeptide-1 is a single chain recombinant fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from r-Salmon Oligopeptide-1, and sh-Oligopeptide-1. The fused peptide contains 63 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Briareum Excavatum Extract is the extract of the coral, Briareum excavatum, Briareidae.
Cholesteryl Glucoside is the product obtained by the condensation of Cholesterol with glucose.
Trapa Natans Peel Extract is the extract of the peel of Trapa natans, Trapaceae.

Alloferon-1 is a single chain maggot protein produced synthetically to be identical to Alloferon-1 which is found in the maggot, Calliphora vicina. The protein contains 13 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Daedalea Dickinsii Mycelium Extract Filtrate is a filtrate of an extract of the mycelium of Daedalea dickinsii, Fomitopsidaceae.
Caralluma Fimbriata Stem Extract is the extract of the stems of Caralluma fimbriata, Apocynaceae
Ficus Infectoria Bark Extract is the extract of the bark of Ficus infectoria, Moraceae
Heptapeptide-8 is the synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, isoleucine, leucine and phenylalanine
Cornus Officinalis Fruit Extract is an extract of the sarcocarp of Cornus officinalis, Cornaceae
C18-29 Alkane is a mixture of alkanes with 18 to 29 carbon atoms in the alkyl chain.

Hydrolyzed Whey is the hydrolysate of Whey derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis.
Globosus Extract is the extract of the alga, Dysmorphococcus globosus.
Althaea Officinalis Flower Extract is the extract of the flowers of  Althaea officinalis, Malvaceae
Tripeptide-67 is the synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, aspartic acid and glutamic acid.
Polyglyceryl-10 Isostearate/Succinate is the mixture of esters of Polyglycerin-10 with a mixture of isostearic and succinic acids.
Bambusa Tuldoides Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of Bambusa tuldoides.
Ficus Religiosa Stem Extract is the extract of the stems of Ficus religiosa, Moraceae.
Sophora Japonica Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Sophora japonica, Leguminosae.
Centaurea Cyanus Seed are the seeds obtained from Centaurea cyanus, Compositae.
Pogostemon Cablin Flower Extract is the extract of the flowers of Pogostemon cablin, Labiatae.

Aesculus Hippocastanum/Pavia Flower Extract is the extract of the flowers of the hybrid formed between  Aesculus hippocastanum  and  Aesculus pavia
Hydrolyzed Nymphaea Tetragona Extract is the hydrolysate of an extract of Nymphaea tetragona derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis, Nymphaeaceae.
Parachlorella Beijerinckii Exopolysaccharides are exopolysaccharides produced through the fermentation of the microalgae  Parachlorella beijerinckii.
Ficus Erecta Branch/Leaf Extract is the extract of the branches and leaves of  Ficus erecta, Moraceae.

Pinus Thunbergii Bark Extract is the extract of the bark of  Pinus thunbergii, Pinaceae.
sh-Decapeptide-1 sh-Polypeptide-2 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide produced by fermentation in  E.coli.

sh-Decapeptide-1 sh-Polypeptide-9 is a synthetc fusion peptide produced by fermentation in  E. coli.  The starting is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Decapeptide-1 and sh-Polypeptide-9. The fusion peptide contains 216 amino acids and consist of the proper sequence of the 20 amino acids.
Pentapeptide-48 is the synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, glutamic acid, leucine, serine and threonine.
Hyaluronate rh-Oligopeptide-1 is the product formed by the reaction of Hyaluronic Acid (q.v.) and rh-Oligopeptide-1
Galaxaura Rugosa/Sargassum Pacificum/Turbinaria Ornata Extract is the extract of the algae,  Galaxaura rugosa, Sargassum pacificum  and  Turbinaria ornata.
Lactobacillus/Magnolia Obovata Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of  Magnolia obovata  by the microorganism,  Lactobacillus.
Picea Glauca Bark Extract is the extract of the bark of  Picea glauca, Pinaceae.
Heptapeptide-30 is the synthetic peptide consisting of glutamine, leucine, lysine, threonine, aned methionine.

Octapeptide-33 is the synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, methionine, tyrptophan, tyrosine and valine.

sr-Clostridium Botulinum Polypeptide-1 is a single chain recombinant protein produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized to be identical to the gene which codes for Botulinum Neurotoxin Type A derived from Clostridium botulinum. The protein contains 1296 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

chemicalDescription: Saccharomyces/Wheat Germ Ferment Filtrate is the filtrate of the fermentation of Triticum Vulgare (Wheat) Germ, by the microorganism,  Saccharomyces.
Tsuga Canadensis Bark Extract is the extract of the bark of  Tsuga Canadensis, Pinaceae.

Methionyl sh-Oligopeptide-2 Decapeptide-40 is a single chain recombinant fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in  E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Oligopeptide-2 and Decapeptide-40 with the initiation code for methionine. The fusion peptide contains 81 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Palmitoyl Tripeptide-7 HCl is the hydrochloride salt of the product obtained by the reaction of palmitoyl chloride and Tripeptide-7
Carboxylesterase is the enzyme that catalyzes the hydrolysis of carboxylic acids.
